reviewers.notes: Tests cover FR-AITUI-001 AC-1..AC-6 and SEC-AITUI-002 AC-1..AC-5 for desktop Tools menu recovery option dialog behavior, command validation, empty argument persistence, default deletion, and safe icon display/rejection paths.

Unit tests use Node test and source-contract assertions to avoid TypeScript module-resolution failures before production files exist. Playwright tests target the existing desktop header Tools menu and stable API helpers.

The 11 sidecar acceptance cases are represented by T-PH004-01 test names across recoveryOptionDialog.test.ts and recoveryOptionIcon.test.ts; the Playwright spec covers the desktop https://localhost:2002 path.
Red failures are due to missing frontend recovery option UI/API hook, missing recovery icon frontend types/rendering, and absent 복구 옵션 Tools menu item; typecheck and diff checks pass.

verification.failure_signature: recovery option UI/API hook is not implemented

verification.command: npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/recovery-options.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
